name: public-sector-grants
description: Government & nonprofit grants team — 3 agents (grant-strategist, proposal-writer, grants-compliance-analyst) for the funder-side discipline of winning and managing public grants: opportunity fit & go/no-go (strategist); proposal narrative, SMART objectives, evaluation plan, budget narrative (writer); and 2 CFR Uniform Guidance — allowable/allocable/reasonable costs, indirect rate & match, sub-recipient monitoring, drawdowns & reporting, single audit (compliance). Decision-tree knowledge bank (5 Mermaid trees + dated authority map), 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios, and a stdlib-only runnable calculator (grants_calc.py: indirect-cost on an MTDC base, required match/shortfall, budget roll-up). Distinct from nonprofit-fundraising (the donor/major-gifts side). Seams: donor fundraising -> nonprofit-fundraising; GL / fund accounting -> finance; security controls for federal data -> cybersecurity-grc. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
